entry.title: New: Bill 64, CD1 (2023) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING SECTION 3.16.020, MAUI COUNTY CODE, RELATING TO SETTLEMENT OF CLAIMS AND OTHER CIVIL LITIGATION" The purpose of this bill is to amend language in subsections A (Workers' Compensation Claims) and B (Other Claims or Civil Litigation) of Section 3.16.020, Maui County Code, to increase Corporation Counsel's authority to settle claims, from $7,500 to $25,000, without Council approval.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
